name: add-codex-adversarial-planning-review
title: Add Codex adversarial planning review
description: Add a pack-owned Claude project rule that invokes native Codex as an optional adversarial peer reviewer for materially changed Trellis planning artifacts and requires grounded concern disposition before implementation.
scope: Claude planning-artifact review integration, shared workflow contract, installer surfaces, tests, docs, and release metadata
creator: sdelmas
notes: Planning uses a pack-installed Claude project rule so direct trellis-brainstorm is covered without changing upstream Trellis. Native codex exec remains optional and plugin-independent.
